name: Drama
description: Narrative films focused on realistic characters and emotional themes.

name: Thriller
description: Films designed to generate suspense, tension, and excitement.

name: Crime
description: Films centred on criminal acts, investigations, or the criminal underworld.

name: Science Fiction
description: Speculative films exploring futuristic technology, space, and artificial intelligence.

name: Horror
description: Films intended to frighten, disturb, or unsettle the audience.

name: Romance
description: Films focused on love relationships and emotional intimacy.

name: War
description: Films set during armed conflicts depicting combat and its human cost.

name: Historical
description: Films set in or depicting a specific historical period or event.

name: Documentary
description: Non-fiction films presenting factual information about real events or people.

name: Experimental
description: Films that challenge conventional narrative and formal filmmaking structures.

name: Comedy
description: Films intended to provoke laughter through character, situation, or dialogue.

name: Adventure
description: Films emphasising journeys, quests, and physically daring situations.

name: Philosophical
description: Films centrally concerned with existential, ethical, or metaphysical questions.

name: Social Realism
description: Films that depict the everyday lives of working-class or marginalised people.

name: Feminist
description: Films that foreground female experience and critique patriarchal structures.
